zcSet color options of Text widget.
    If ColorDelegator is used, this should be called first.
    Z
normalZ

inactiveselectbackgroundN)
CurrentTheme
GetHighlightZ
config)
text
themeZ
normal_colorsZ
cursor_colorZ
select_colorsr
color_config&
ColorDelegatora-
Delegator for syntax highlighting (text coloring).
    Instance variables:
        delegate: Delegator below this one in the stack, meaning the
                one this one delegates to.
        Used to track state:
        after_id: Identifier for scheduled after event, which is a
                timer for colorizing the text.
        allow_colorizing: Boolean toggle for applying colorizing.
        colorizing: Boolean flag when colorizing is in process.
        stop_colorizing: Boolean flag to end an active colorizing
                process.
    c
__init__
init_state
prog
idprog
LoadTagDefs
selfr
ColorDelegator.__init__c
z1Initialize variables that track colorizing state.NTF)
after_id
allow_colorizing
stop_colorizing
colorizingr+
ColorDelegator.init_statec
Set the delegate for this instance.
        A delegate is an instance of a Delegator class and each
        delegate points to the next delegator in the stack.  This
        allows multiple delegators to be chained together for a
        widget.  The bottom delegate for a colorizer is a Text
        widget.
        If there is a delegate, also start the colorizing process.
        Nz
<<toggle-auto-coloring>>
endTF)
delegateZ
unbindr
setdelegate
config_colorsZ
bind
toggle_colorize_event
notify_ranger/
ColorDelegator.setdelegatec
z4Configure text widget tags with colors from tagdefs.Z
selN)
tagdefs
itemsZ
tag_configureZ	tag_raise)
tagZ
cnfr
ColorDelegator.config_colorsc
z.Create dictionary of tag names to text colors.r
definitionN)

zCMark text changes for processing and restart colorizing, if active.r>
colorizing already scheduledNT
stop colorizingz
schedule colorizing
tag_addr-

ColorDelegator.notify_rangec
cancel scheduled recolorizerFT)
after_cancelr.
close
ColorDelegator.closec
Toggle colorizing on and off.
        When toggling off, if colorizing is scheduled or is in
        process, it will be cancelled and/or stopped.
        When toggling on, colorizing will be scheduled.
        NrM
auto colorizing turnedZ
break)	r-
eventr-
z$ColorDelegator.toggle_colorize_eventc
Timer event (every 1ms) to colorize text.
        Colorizing is only attempted when the text widget exists,
        when colorizing is toggled on, and when the colorizing
        process is not already running.
        After colorizing is complete, some cleanup is done to
        make sure that all the text has been colorized.
        Nz
no delegatez
auto colorizing is offz
already colorizingFTz
colorizing...z
%.3f secondsr>
reschedule colorizingrI
time
perf_counter
recolorize_main
tag_nextrangerK
ColorDelegator.recolorizec
}	|	s

Percolatorz
Test ColorDelegator
700x250+%d+%d
if True: int ('1') # keyword, builtin, string, comment
elif False: print(0)
else: float(None)
if iF + If + IF: 'keyword matching must respect case'
if'': x or''  # valid keyword-string no-space combinations
async def f(): await g()
# All valid prefixes for unicode and byte strings should be colored.
'x', '''x''', "x", """x"""
r'x', u'x', R'x', U'x', f'x', F'x'
fr'x', Fr'x', fR'x', FR'x', rf'x', rF'x', Rf'x', RF'x'
b'x',B'x', br'x',Br'x',bR'x',BR'x', rb'x', rB'x',Rb'x',RB'x'
# Invalid combinations of legal characters should be half colored.
ur'x', ru'x', uf'x', fu'x', UR'x', ufr'x', rfu'x', xf'x', fx'x'
white)
both)
